calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Daniel Riley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Equity Residential Management, LLC.
Alexandra LaFlam, Community Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Sean Wesley, a/k/a Sean Wesley Conley.
Plaintiff's first amended complaint was filed on January 2, 2019.
Defendant's answer to plaintiff's first amended complaint was filed January 8, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 9, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on January 10, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Equity Residential Management, LLC, and against defendant Sean Wesley, a/k/a Sean Wesley Conley, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $4,433.00.
Holdover Damages - $3,843.28.
Attorney Fees - $652.50.
Costs - $340.00.
Total: $9,268.78.

Additionally, plaintiff Equity Residential Management, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 625 8th Street, #207, San Francisco, CA 94103.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Assigned To Trial Court
